title: Dashboard - Which widgets support the subitems?

posts.author: denisjocic (Denis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone at Monday,

How do we assign the sub-item status column to the Status overview (Battery) widget for progress tracking?

My team manages several projects, each with a separate board. To further categorize the sheer number of tasks, we use sub-items exclusively. The ability we would like is to have the battery visualize the sum of all sub-item statuses.

Alternatively, can we achieve this through any other widget?

Screenshot_21679×903 116 KB

posts.author: AronK (Aron-monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @denisjocic!

At the moment, subitems are not fully supported in dashboard widgets. While there is some supported capabilities in certain widgets, we do not have support for the battery nor chart widget which would be the best place to get you what you’re looking for.

Keep an eye out as we continue to build out support for subitems in widgets! Here is a roadmap you can bookmark for future updates.

-Aron

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
